allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking gives meta-cognitive-reflection a sharper evaluative standard so self-observation improves judgment instead of becoming narrative about the self.
allies.source_quote: reflection improves performance when it tests and corrects thinking

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps meta-cognitive-reflection notice patterns, interactions, and recurring process errors instead of treating each miss as isolated.
allies.source_quote: metacognition helps learners understand the broader patterns in how they think

allies.rationale_text: Step-back is the operational move that gives meta-cognitive-reflection room to inspect and reset the current thinking process before continuing.
allies.source_quote: a deliberate pause enables monitoring and adjustment of thought

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias weakens meta-cognitive-reflection by making the self-audit protect the current story instead of revising it.
antagonists.source_quote: reflection fails when it only justifies what the thinker already wants to believe

structured_tensions.tension_text: Meta-cognitive-reflection conflicts with flow when excessive self-monitoring interrupts sustained execution on critical tasks.
structured_tensions.source_quote: meta-cognitive-reflection conflicts with flow (flow) when excessive self-monitoring interrupts sustained execution on critical tasks.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Meta-cognitive-reflection conflicts with emotional-intelligence when introspective analysis delays timely relational response.
structured_tensions.source_quote: meta-cognitive-reflection conflicts with emotional-intelligence (emotional intelligence) when introspective analysis delays timely relational response.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Meta-cognitive-reflection conflicts with confirmation-bias when process monitoring is replaced by belief-protecting self-explanation.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on self-correction through critical review, systems patterning, and step-back plus explicit tensions against flow, emotional-intelligence, and confirmation-bias.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the strongest current-vocabulary process-audit neighborhood.
